nasb.text: And I say to you, whoever divorces his wife, except for immorality, and marries another woman commits adultery.”

esv.text: And I say to you: whoever divorces his wife, except for sexual immorality, and marries another, commits adultery.”

cnv.text: 我告訴你們，凡休妻另娶的，如果不是因為妻子不貞，就是犯姦淫了。”

ccb.text: 我告诉你们，除非是妻子不贞，否则，任何人休妻另娶，就是犯通奸罪。”

csbs.text: 我告诉你们：如果有人不是由于淫乱的缘故而休妻，另娶别人，就是犯通奸罪。”
